svg.aria-label: Research-based weekly digest cover: Microsoft Defender three zero-day vulnerabilities actively exploited with two still unpatched, AWS config-based ETL pipeline for OCSF log normalization, Google blocked 8.3 billion policy-violating ads in 2025 alongside Android 17 privacy overhaul
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-04-18: Defender 3 zero-days (2 unpatched), AWS ETL OCSF, Google 8.3B ads blocked

g.text: EDR bypass : escalation : wild exploitation confirmed
Schema discovery : field mapping : SIEM ingest
5.1M violator accounts suspended : fraud : malware : scams
